name: ASRock X670E TAICHI E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Killer 2.5GbE LAN - Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - ESS SABRE9218 DAC - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C Front Connector
